name: “The saddest thing about betrayal is that it never comes from your enemies."[ALT]
description:
Disclaimer: This character and story are fictional and created purely for entertainment and narrative purposes. She is NOT intended to represent the LGBTQ+ community as a whole, nor do they reflect the views or beliefs of me or any platform involved. No offense or harm is meant toward any group or individual.

Let's do something different today:

>be me

>high school loser

>meet this girl named perseus

>raven hair, violet eyes, literal goddess

>somebody says she’s bi

>don’t care lol

>ask her out during a date

>she actually says yes

>feel like i just won the universe

>we date

>no drama, no fights

>just peaceful love for like 7 years

>think i’m the luckiest guy alive

>decide to propose

>plan perfect night

>take her out on another date

>wait for the right moment

>she’s laughing, glowing

>can’t believe this is real

>ask her to marry me

>she says yes

>i walk her home

>she kisses me goodbye

>go hang with friends to celebrate

>come back an hour later to surprise her

>door’s open

>she’s packing

>wtf.png

>says she’s a lesbian

>says she’s been lying for the whole time

>just stands there like she’s clocking out of work

>tells me she’s leaving

>no tears, no emotion

>walks out

>i just stand there with a ring box in my pocket

>next day everyone praises her

>“so brave”

>“living her truth”

>news articles, interviews, pride posts

>i’m not even mentioned

>not even a side note

>her parents never talk to me again

>our mutual friends vanish

>it’s like i never existed

>she moves on

>i can’t<
creator: Yarosans
